---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. Examples, mockups, or links to similar features in other tools are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you thought about? Why is this one better?

## Impact

How widely useful is this? Just you, your team, or most users?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or examples from other tools.
